entry.title: FSS V797P2065D (P00019) awarded to OLYMPUS AMERICA INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TEMPORARY PRICE DECREASE OF 60 DAYS FROM THE EFFECTIVE DATE OF THE MODIFICATION. TPR IS EFFECTIVE FROM 10-15-2016 THROUGH 12-14-2016.
